title: bidens selenactis
intro: Bidens selenactis, also known as Blackseed or Tickseed, is a flowering plant species native to Australia, New Zealand, and parts of Asia. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The medicinal properties of Bidens selenactis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight bacterial and fungal infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support immune function and overall health.
